425.reason: [Incorrect token stream manipulation: The arbitrary moves and backs disrupt proper token consumption. The parser should consume tokens sequentially without unnecessary backtracking, especially since Decl parsing already consumes its tokens properly. This will cause incorrect token positioning and potential infinite loops or missed declarations.]
